channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carronade Place, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SORN car dumped in front of 2 Macallister House on Barnfield Estate, 2nd March
item.description:
Yet another long standing abandoned SORN car dumped on the Barnfield estate taking up spaces for residents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human feaces, 2nd March
item.description:
Human faeces top of staircase at wilmot close end in Neville Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22-23, Neville Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned large rubbish bin, 2nd March
item.description:
Took this photo of abandoned large rubbish bin on 23 February

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Priestlands Park Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitt on fence facing pedestrian crossing on Burbage Rd near jct with Half Moon Lan, 2nd March
item.description:
This graffiti was noted on Sunday 1 March.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Burbage Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the bank outside Gail’s etc, 2nd March
item.description:
There is all sorts of,litter on the shrubby bank between the road and the raised walkway between Gail’s and Jumping Bean 41 High Street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole cluster in West Heath Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Apparently significant potholes for most of the length of the section of West Heath Road between Whitestone Walk and Branch Hill.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees cut down not replaced, 2nd March
item.description:
Could the trees be replaced in the station car park (on the Rectory Road side)? Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd March
item.description:
Would it be possible to ask BT to replace the phone box at Beckenham Junction station? It is grafitti’d and etched and looks awful.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken comms box and barrier, 2nd March
item.description:
This has been in this state for months. The electrics were being worked on recently, but the box is still broken and an eyesore, with a barrier. Probably a ULEZ camera box so down to TfL.to replace the box. Why aren’t they fixing it? Please chase them. Please provide an update.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16-18, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin flytipped on fenham road, 2nd March
item.description:
Please remove. has been here for a week now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Fenham Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in M&S car park, 2nd March
item.description:
Is it possible to ask M&S to clear up their litter? Their car park is an awful mess.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 2nd March
item.description:
Would it be possible to spend more time picking up litter here, please? The team do a good job, but there is visible litter in the bushes and around the benches. Thank you to the team though for what they do.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin full again, 2nd March
item.description:
Litter bin once again full. Would it be possible to empty this bin more frequently, please? It is very quickly filled up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Countdown not working, 2nd March
item.description:
Reported twice previously and still not fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the comms box, 2nd March
item.description:
Near 16a Hayne Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayne Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In road outside 21/25, 2nd March
item.description:
The man hole cover rocks when cars travel over it. It is very loud and disturbing. Been this way for over a month.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Agar Grove, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ALL Stop lines faded, 2nd March
item.description:
Stop line faded on A,B, C, D,E, F phase- required repainting
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jute Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Broken Tolley-Bag Dumped on Pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
An unwanted and broken trolley-bag has been dumped on the pavement outside number 31. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish and Unwanted Toy Dumped on Pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish and an unwanted toy have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ann Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
